licenceState: Propose CC0-1.0 before public release; not yet public production copy.
contentNotice: All projects, names, organisations, claims, and figures in these specimens are invented for typographic testing.
rule: These samples introduce individual systems. Recommendation comparisons use shared user or artifact copy instead.

specimens.title: Put the answer on the slide.
specimens.body: Lead with the decision. Keep the evidence close. Move the supporting detail to the appendix so the room can stay with the argument.
specimens.difficultLine: Maya Chen, Jordan Lee & Alex Rivera — July 18, 2026 · $52,000 · 38%
specimens.metricLabel: less copy in the revised deck

specimens.title: The numbers are certain. The future isn’t.
specimens.body: The model can describe what happened. People still decide what happens next. Keep the assumptions beside the forecast, the source beside the claim, and one honest unknown in the room.

specimens.title: We inherit the house at low tide.
specimens.body: Mara returns to the island with one key, two debts, and no intention of staying. By morning, the sea has uncovered a road nobody remembers building—and the village has begun to remember her differently.
specimens.difficultLine: Mara Alvarez · Block Island, 1987–2026 · ‘You came back for the wrong ghost.’

specimens.title: Nothing matched. That was the beginning.
specimens.body: The film moves through borrowed rooms, half-finished inventions, and the small ceremonies people make when the official ones have failed them. The camera stays close enough to catch the repairs.
specimens.difficultLine: Amal + Éloïse — Detroit / Marseille · 4:37 · $18,500 production allowance

specimens.title: Nothing important should disappear in the last row.
specimens.body: A live slide has one job: help the room stay with you. Use fewer words, name the evidence plainly, and give every person enough time and space to read before the conversation moves on.

specimens.title: The river knows the route home.
specimens.body: For thirty years, Lena has mapped every flood that entered the valley. When a new dam promises safety at the cost of the last town upstream, her careful archive becomes evidence, inheritance, and a reason to disobey.

specimens.title: Evidence first. Then an opinion worth having.
specimens.body: The research does not ask for certainty. It asks us to show the pattern, name the gap, and make a decision someone can revise when better evidence arrives. Confidence without a source is just expensive posture.
specimens.difficultLine: N = 1,248 · Austin + Bogotá · 62% / 38% · margin of error ±3.1%

specimens.title: Serious work can arrive smiling.
specimens.body: The organisation is growing, but it does not need to harden. Keep the welcome specific, the rules legible, and enough oddness in the room for people to recognise themselves there.
specimens.difficultLine: Aïcha, Renée & João — 14 cities · $240K · 86% returned the following year
